hero_subtitle: SFTY structures jurisdiction-specific VARA workflows by linking provider outputs, preserving evidence, and supporting compliance teams with audit-ready case management and regulatory reporting.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Audit readiness weakens across disconnected workflows
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to assemble complete evidence for VARA audits when provider outputs and regulatory updates remain siloed. This fragmentation creates delays and gaps in defensible, audit-ready compliance documentation and case histories.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates provider outputs, regulatory updates, case workflows and decision logs into one operational layer so compliance teams can prepare consistent, traceable and audit-ready VARA compliance evidence.
workflow_title: From jurisdictional checks to audit evidence
workflow_description: SFTY organizes jurisdiction-specific provider outputs, rules and case reviews into documented evidence that supports VARA compliance audit readiness and reporting workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented compliance. Audit-ready evidence control
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects jurisdiction-specific outputs into structured workflows, cases, decisions and preserved evidence to support clear audit readiness for VARA compliance reviews.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs managing jurisdiction-specific VARA workflows with controlled provider outputs, audit-ready evidence, bank due diligence, and enterprise-grade deployment governance.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VARA compliance?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects regulatory rules, provider outputs and workflows to help VASPs meet VARA compliance requirements with structured cases, evidence and reporting across jurisdictions.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support VARA audit workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures VARA audit workflows by linking alerts, cases, rule triggers and reviewer actions into a controlled process with audit logs and evidence packages.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve VARA compliance evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves evidence-grade records, decision logs and case history to support audit readiness and traceability for VARA regulatory reviews.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing VARA providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates with existing onboarding, KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers without replacing them, orchestrating their outputs into one compliance system.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace VARA compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace VARA providers; it sits above them to connect outputs into workflows, decisions, cases and reports for efficient compliance management.
final_description: Review how SFTY structures provider outputs into traceable cases and preserves evidence for VARA regulatory audit readiness.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
footer_contact_title: For supervisory, compliance and deployment discussions.
footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
